direction: Ancient Empires-inspired turn-based tactics with village capture, commander-led armies, a large frontier campaign, and classic unit-counter warfare on mobile.
visual_differentiation_axes: left commander ledger plus bottom turn ribbon instead of top stat pills or a full bottom command strip
campaign-atlas and war-room navigation instead of plain centered menu panels
indigo cloth brass and wax-seal palette instead of neon glass or ruin-survival palettes
selection-driven right context drawer for forecast and recruitment instead of persistent oversized HUD blocks
war pennant milestone icon subject with tactical-map grid instead of castle shield zombie or helmet motifs
forbidden_visual_reuse: do not reuse a top-pill HUD with a full-width bottom action bar
do not reuse wall-defense battlement framing from empire_wall_guard
do not reuse sci-fi glass panels or post-apocalypse hazard rails
do not reuse another project's exported icon silhouette or palette pairing
do not use a plain banner icon with no milestone and no tactical-map grid signal

ui_identity.layout_archetype: left commander ledger plus bottom turn ribbon plus conditional right-side unit detail drawer
ui_identity.hud_composition: commander portrait and gold on the left, turn and action controls along the bottom, unit forecast and recruit details on the right, and a compact objective pennant at the upper right
ui_identity.navigation_model: frontier campaign atlas to chapter briefing to battlefield deployment, with a war-room layer for roster doctrine and codex management between battles
ui_identity.palette_signature: indigo command cloth, burnished brass, chalk white, muted parchment tan, frontier red wax, and moss-green terrain accents
ui_identity.material_language: lacquered map table edges, brass pins, cloth pennants, wax seals, inked route lines, and carved command plaques
ui_identity.typography_style: disciplined military headline styling for titles, clean tactical body text for stats, and large high-contrast numerals for gold HP and forecast values

reserved_edges: upper-right corner small objective pennant zone
playfield_safety.frame_overlay_policy: decorative command-table framing may live outside the board bounds only and must never cover active tiles, threat highlights, or touch-critical unit cells

unique_screen_motifs: pinned province markers on the campaign atlas
battle result standards stamped onto parchment reports
forbidden_ui_elements: generic centered three-button menu with no atlas identity
heavy stone frame overlapping the battlefield
fantasy tavern parchment cards as the primary HUD language

icon_identity.subject: a royal war pennant planted into a cracked frontier milestone with a square tactical-map tile pattern behind it
icon_identity.silhouette: tall angled pennant, banner pole, chipped milestone base, and a visible square-grid backing shape
icon_identity.composition: the pennant dominates the upper left, the milestone anchors the lower third, and the tile-grid backdrop fills the rear plane with one diagonal spear-shadow for motion
icon_identity.palette: deep indigo, brass gold, off-white stone, muted crimson wax accent, and dark map-shadow neutrals
icon_identity.background: faded campaign-map texture with subtle tile lines and no flat generic badge
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: the milestone and tile grid make the icon read as border conquest on a tactics board rather than a generic fantasy emblem
forbidden_icon_reuse: no plain flag with no milestone and no tactical grid
